overall.description: A cinematic slow pan across a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves from an elevated balcony overlooking a street market, across a steam-filled canal, toward a hazy skyline with flying vehicles passing by. The scene features warm, diffused morning light piercing through atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated balcony over cyberpunk street market

events.description: view transitions from street level to reveal the water canal beyond
industrial steam vents become visible releasing white plumes

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the camera right from a high balcony, revealing the cityscape below and the emerging waterway

entered.detail: tall building with vertical green neon signage and red structural accents
colorful vendor stalls and structures lining the street below the balcony
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street with railings
industrial vents and pipes releasing white steam into the air
wide body of water separating the foreground from the distant city skyline

segments.scene_description: From a sheltered elevated balcony, the camera slowly pans right across a cyberpunk street market. The green neon tower dominates the left side initially, while industrial steam vents and a wide water canal gradually come into view as the pan progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal waterfront with industrial steam vents

events.description: flying vehicle enters from left and passes across the hazy skyline
second flying vehicle follows the same trajectory across the frame

agents.ego_description: tracking flying vehicles as they traverse the skyline while continuing the slow panoramic sweep across the water

notable_agents.action: flying car moving horizontally from left to right above the canal through the haze

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and corporate towers visible across the water
thick white steam rising prominently from ventilation grates in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide view of the canal with industrial steam rising in the foreground. Flying vehicles pass across the hazy skyline as the camera continues panning right, revealing the distant cyberpunk cityscape across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic canal view with distant corporate towers

events.description: distant flying vehicles visible hovering near the horizon
steam plume dissipates and moves out of frame as camera passes the vents

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic view of the waterfront and distant corporate district

entered.detail: lower level walkway along the water's edge with metal railings and structures
distinctive tall building with antenna arrays visible through the morning haze

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a wide panoramic view of the canal and distant corporate skyline. The steam vents fall behind as the camera continues its slow sweep, showing the waterfront promenade and hovering vehicles in the far distance against the hazy morning light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous slow pan from a sheltered urban balcony toward a vast, hazy cyberpunk skyline. It begins by sweeping past a green neon tower and a bustling street market, gradually revealing industrial steam vents and a wide water canal. As the camera continues its rightward movement, the view opens up to show flying vehicles gliding across a smoggy horizon while the foreground steam begins to thin. The scene then expands into a wide panoramic vista of the waterfront promenade, leaving the industrial vents behind. Finally, the movement settles on the distant corporate skyline and hovering vehicles bathed in the diffused glow of morning light.
